data.summary: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The requirement to validate geofencing functionality is not supported by any concrete API reads or persisted state checks in the provided evidence. While the linked use case mentions the need for geofencing, there are no specific examples or evidence demonstrating that this feature has been implemented or tested. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence of geofencing functionality being tested or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify geofencing functionality.
